edges.child_node: "Ottoman Army soldiers killed in the Battle of Baku"

Id1.text: The Baku Turkish Martyrs Memorial has been dedicated to Ottoman Army soldiers killed in the Battle of Baku and is made of red granite and white marble.

Id2.text: The Baku Turkish Martyrs Memorial, created in red granite and white marble, is dedicated to the Ottoman Army soldiers killed in the Battle of Baku.
